title: centella scabra
intro: Centella scabra, also known as Indian pennywort or gotu kola, is a perennial herb native to Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centella scabra include improved cognitive function, reduced anxiety and stress, enhanced wound healing, and improved skin health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and vitality.
